results.title: AFX Accelerates Global Expansion with Industry Veteran Ken C Leading Growth
results.description: ROAD TOWN, British Virgin Islands, June 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- AFX, a high-performance sovereign L1 purpose-built for decentralized derivatives, announced that industry veteran Ken C has joined the protocol as Head of Growth, reinforcing AFX's commitment to expanding its global trading...

results.title: Reddit Post Removal Succeeds Once You Win Over the Right Gatekeeper, Says Respect Network
results.description: Reddit presents the most decentralized removal problem on the mainstream internet. A damaging thread about a company or founder is not governed by one moderation system but by three: the volunteer moderators of the subreddit where it sits, Reddit’s sitewide administrators enforcing the platform’s content policy, and ultimately the author, who can... Read the full article on TechBullion.
